known_errors.example: 'ein interessantes Fakt' should be 'eine interessante Tatsache'

strengths: good at providing details in descriptions
successfully using relevant vocabulary for shopping
progressing in expressing preferences and ordering food
engaging well with the topic of hobbies and preferences
teaching_notes: James is enthusiastic and eager to learn, often using emojis to express emotions.
He sometimes struggles with vocabulary and article usage, but he is quick to understand corrections.
He enjoys informal conversation topics related to his interests, such as video games and studies.
James has improved in using articles correctly and providing detailed descriptions of his living space.
He is successfully using vocabulary related to shopping and making simple purchases.
James is gaining confidence in expressing preferences and ordering food in German, though he occasionally drifts off-topic.
He has shown improved ability to express preferences and discuss hobbies, using relevant vocabulary and structures.
next_session_plan: Continue to reinforce vocabulary and phrases related to hobbies and preferences. Encourage James to practice using complete sentences with correct articles in these contexts. Introduce more complex sentence structures and vocabulary related to discussing films and books. Consider a role-play scenario where James can discuss a film or book he has recently enjoyed, using newly learned vocabulary.
